cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists activity_checkers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists activity_registrations cascade Hibernate: create table activities ( capacity integer, created_at timestamp(6), end_time timestamp(6), id bigint not null, start_time timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), created_by varchar(50) not null, reward varchar(100), google_form_url varchar(500) not null, location varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, category enum ('ACADEMIC','FACULTY','MOVEMENT','OTHER','UNIVERSITY') not null, status enum ('COMPLETED','ONGOING','UPCOMING') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table activity_checkers ( activity_id bigint not null, id bigint not null, checker_code varchar(50), checker_tsid varchar(50) not null, checker_name varchar(150), primary key (id), constraint uk_activity_checker unique (activity_id, checker_tsid) ) Hibernate: create table activity_registrations ( is_attended boolean not null, activity_id bigint not null, checkin_time timestamp(6), id bigint not null, student_code varchar(50) not null, user_tsid varchar(50) not null, full_name varchar(150), primary key (id), constraint uk_activity_user_tsid unique (activity_id, user_tsid), constraint uk_activity_student_code unique (activity_id, student_code) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists activity_checkers add constraint FK7iohas5hsnndwtijg6v7ggetu foreign key (activity_id) references activities Hibernate: alter table if exists activity_registrations add constraint FKj6kk52cdt8bh1k3p33g9j6aap foreign key (activity_id) references activities
